privileged_info_summary: Task loan_payoff_strategy@1 uses synthetically generated student loan data created in setup_task.sh. The task involves 4 loans with verified balances ($12,500, $8,200, $3,800, $6,100), interest rates (4.5%, 7.2%, 5.0%, 6.8%), and minimum payments ($150, $120, $75, $95). Interest rate calculations are mathematically accurate: monthly rates are annual rate divided by 12, yielding monthly interest percentages of 0.375%, 0.6%, 0.4167%, and 0.5667% respectively, corresponding to monthly interest charges of $46.88, $49.20, $15.83, and $34.57. Private Bank A at 7.2% is correctly identified as the priority loan (highest interest rate). The task has 7 verification criteria with a 70% pass threshold, 180-second timeout, and maximum 15 steps. Environment libreoffice_calc_env@0.1 is confirmed to exist and is properly configured for LibreOffice Calc spreadsheet tasks.
